prompt: Run the weekly GTM pulse and post to the configured channels.
expected_behavior: data-collector pulls all five sections, pulse-composer formats them, delivery-router checks first-run state and routes Sections 1/2/3/5 to #revops-alignment and Sections 4/5 to #cs-leadership

prompt: Run the GTM pulse in preview mode — show me the output but don't post to Slack.
expected_behavior: Full pipeline runs, delivery-router renders all sections in session, no Slack posts made, preview mode clearly noted

prompt: Run the weekly pulse but only Sections 1 and 3 this week — skip the churn section.
expected_behavior: data-collector pulls only Sections 1 and 3, pulse-composer formats only those sections, delivery-router posts only to #revops-alignment

prompt: Run just the churn signals section this week and send it to CS leadership.
expected_behavior: data-collector pulls Section 4 only, pulse-composer formats Section 4, delivery-router posts to #cs-leadership. Tier 3 gate applies if high-ACV flags present.

prompt: Set up and run the GTM pulse for the first time.
expected_behavior: delivery-router detects first_run_confirmed = false, displays routing confirmation and schedule prompt, waits for operator confirmation, writes state file, then proceeds with delivery

When tier3_flags contains accounts with ACV > $250K, delivery-router pauses before posting Section 4 and requests explicit confirmation. Posts Sections 1/2/3/5 immediately; holds Section 4 until confirmed.
data-collector returns hubspot = unavailable, Sections 1–3 degrade, delivery-router prepends data availability note to posts, Sections 4 and 5 post normally if CS platform is live
delivery-router attempts Slack post, receives failure, renders all sections in session, reports delivery failed, provides output for manual distribution
